lines.speaker: Leke quo Keran
lines.text: Do you wish to serve the balance? You'll need weapons if you do. These, I can provide.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you make a lot of money selling weapons?

lines.speaker: Leke quo Keran
lines.text: To be a Kahlith is to abandon all attachment. Both physical and emotional. I have no use for money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So why don't you give out the weapons for free?

lines.speaker: Leke quo Keran
lines.text: While we care not for money, your kind still do. While a Kahlith will do anything for the balance, your kind are not so generous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you use the money to pay us for things?

lines.speaker: Leke quo Keran
lines.text: Exactly. For us to serve the balance, we must trade with your people. That is what the money is for.

lines.speaker: Leke quo Keran
lines.text: Anyway, would you like to purchase some weapons?
